text.title: Spring Boot Layered Architecture Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema describing the Spring Boot service-layer artefact (controller + service + repo bundle).

section.title: Schema

example.note: controller_class not PascalCase + missing 'Controller' suffix; entities exposed (dto_used=false); @Transactional on controller; field injection; actuator off.

forbidden.pattern: Returning JPA `@Entity` directly from a controller method.
`@Autowired` on a private field — forbidden in favor of constructor.
